description: Shared session-handshake corpus. Kept byte-identical between devmate and monoroot. Every fixture is exercised by BOTH sides: must-accept files parse to a handshake on the consumer (parseSessionHandshake) and validate on the producer (isValidSession), so they carry the full producer shape; must-reject files break a shared handshake field (schemaVersion or the devmate block) so both sides reject them — producer-only strictness (e.g. a missing branchName) deliberately has no fixture here.
